pages.text: When the right molten metals share a hot enough forge, they combine on their own. $(l)Netherite$() forms from molten gold and ancient debris at 2,200°C.$(br2)Toggle auto-alloying with the $(l)A$() button on the controller screen if you want to keep your metals separate.
pages.title: Automatic Alloys

pages.text: Alloy recipes are data-driven — modpacks add their own. Check $(l)JEI$() for the full list, and watch item tooltips: anything meltable shows what it melts into and which alloys want it.
pages.title: Finding Recipes
